AI tools by workflow

AI Content Repurposing Workflow

Turn one idea, recording, or article into a week of useful content without turning your brand into generic AI sludge.

Best forCreators, founders, consultants, and newsletter operators who publish consistently.
OutcomeCreate 5-7 content assets from one source idea while keeping a clear editorial angle.
Bad fit warningDo not use repurposing tools if you do not have a clear point of view. They amplify weak ideas too.
Free operator resource

The Solo Operator AI Workflow Pack

Get practical AI workflow checklists for content, onboarding, automation, research, tool selection, and follow-up systems. Built for solo operators who want leverage, not hype.

Get the workflow pack

Recommended stack

CastmagicDescriptOpusClipCanvaChatGPT

Start with the lightest version that solves the job. Upgrade only when the workflow repeats and the cost is justified.

Workflow

  1. Start with one source asset: call, article, voice memo, or outline.
  2. Extract the strongest problem, promise, examples, objections, and CTA.
  3. Create one long-form draft, one email version, three social posts, and one short video idea.
  4. Rewrite each asset for the platform instead of posting the same summary everywhere.
  5. Track which asset earns replies, clicks, or subscribers and make the next source asset around that signal.

Prompt to copy

Repurpose this source idea into a newsletter, blog outline, LinkedIn post, X thread, short video script, and lead magnet angle. Keep the audience practical and operator-minded.

Next step

Run this once manually, save the result, then decide whether it belongs in a checklist, an AI assistant prompt, or an automation tool.
